title: aconitum × nanum
intro: Aconitum × nanum, also known as Monk's Hood, is a hybrid plant species within the Aconitum genus, characterized by its delicate and bell-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Aconitum × nanum lie in its roots, which contain aconitine and other alkaloids with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant are said to include pain relief, reduced fever, and improved immune function, although its use should be cautious due to its potential toxicity. Aconitum × nanum is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its preparation and dosage should be carefully monitored to avoid adverse effects.
